hooks.command: echo '[Security Hook] Checking for secrets in code changes...' && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|password|token|credential|private[_-]?key)\s*[=:]\s*["'\'']((?!process\.env|os\.environ|\$\{|\{\{).){8,}' 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: Possible hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables instead.' && exit 1; fi && echo '[Security Hook] No secrets detected. Proceeding.'

echo '[Security Hook] Checking command safety...' && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-rf\s+/|:(){ :|chmod\s+777|curl.*\|\s*(bash|sh)|wget.*\|\s*(bash|sh))' 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: Potentially dangerous command detected. Please review.' && exit 1; fi && echo '[Security Hook] Command OK.'
